mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.report_definitions_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, name, description, category, available_formats, is_active, created_time ) SELECT rd.id, rd.tenant, NOW(), rd.name, rd.description, rd.category, rd.available_formats, rd.is_active, rd.created_time FROM hm_reporting.report_definition rd

INSERT INTO hm_query.scheduled_reports_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, report_definition_id, report_name, format, frequency, cron_expression, next_run_at, last_run_at, recipient_email, status, created_time ) SELECT sr.id, sr.tenant, NOW(), sr.report_definition_id, COALESCE(rd.name, ''), sr.format, sr.frequency, sr.cron_expression, sr.next_run_at, sr.last_run_at, sr.recipient_email, sr.status, sr.created_time FROM hm_reporting.scheduled_report sr LEFT JOIN hm_reporting.report_definition rd ON sr.report_definition_id = rd.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.report_history_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, report_definition_id, report_definition_name, name, format, generated_by, file_url, file_size_bytes, record_count, status, completed_at, error_message, created_time ) SELECT rh.id, rh.tenant, NOW(), rh.report_definition_id, COALESCE(rd.name, ''), rh.name, rh.format, rh.generated_by, rh.file_url, rh.file_size_bytes, rh.record_count, rh.status, rh.completed_at, rh.error_message, rh.created_time FROM hm_reporting.report_history rh LEFT JOIN hm_reporting.report_definition rd ON rh.report_definition_id = rd.id
